name: Coverage: Assistant reschedule with confirmation
description: Create a uniquely named event, ask assistant to reschedule it, confirm, and verify success feedback.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Open AI chat with Open AI chat or Control+K
Type Schedule TS Reschedule Target tomorrow at 9am for 30 minutes and Send
Wait up to 8 seconds, then click Create event to confirm
Type Reschedule TS Reschedule Target to tomorrow at 5pm and Send
Wait up to 8 seconds for a reschedule confirmation card
Verify a Reschedule confirmation control or preview for TS Reschedule Target is shown
Click Reschedule or the primary confirm button
Verify success feedback (Applied successfully / Done) or the event time updated toward 17:00 / 5pm on the calendar
Cleanup: type Cancel TS Reschedule Target, Send, wait 3 seconds, click Yes, cancel if shown
